subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from a penitent servant unto them that have soared in the atmosphere of the love of the All-Merciful and have detached themselves from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدن عبد منیب الی الذینهم طاروا فی هواء محبه الرحمن و انقطعوا عن
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @unity; oneness of humanity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment
